title: T-138 — WIRING: FA detail shell + right panel + tabs layout NPD-a slice of T-020
prompt:
# T-138 — FA detail layout wiring

PRD: docs/prd/01-NPD-PRD.md §3, §5
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira
Prototype: prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/npd/fa-screens.jsx:300-452 (fa_detail + fa_right_panel)
Parent root: T-020

## Goal
Wire the shell + tabs container (T-136) and the right panel (T-137) into a layout for /(npd)/fa/[productCode] so the right panel is always visible across all tabs, tabs switch without a full page reload, and right-panel actions open the correct modals (deptClose, d365Build).

## Implementation contract
1. apps/web/app/(npd)/fa/[productCode]/layout.tsx (RSC) fetches FA core + gateProgress + sets up two-column layout: main content (tabs container) + sticky right panel.
2. The layout composes FaTabs (from T-136) on the left and FaRightPanel (from T-137) on the right; right panel persists across tab navigation; tab switches use Next.js client navigation (no full reload).
3. Right-panel onOpenModal is wired to a modal manager (existing ModalProvider) so Dept Close and D365 Build buttons open the correct modals.
4. RTL integration test verifies right panel stays mounted across tab switches and modal openings.

## Files
- apps/web/app/(npd)/fa/[productCode]/layout.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(npd)/fa/[productCode]/_components/__tests__/fa-detail-layout.test.tsx [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given the layout renders at /(npd)/fa/[productCode], when the page mounts, then FaTabs (T-136) renders on the left and FaRightPanel (T-137) renders sticky on the right — verified by RTL integration test
2. Given a user switches tabs (Core → Technical), when the URL ?tab updates, then the right panel stays mounted (no remount) — verified by RTL stable-instance test
3. Given a user clicks Dept Close or D365 Build in the right panel, when the handler invokes onOpenModal, then the ModalProvider opens the correct modal (deptClose or d365Build) — verified by RTL

## Test strategy
- RED: fa-detail-layout.test.tsx asserting layout composition, right panel persistence across tab switch, modal opening before wiring exists
- Run 'pnpm --filter web test fa-detail-layout'

## Risk red lines
- Do not remount the right panel on tab switch — must persist across navigation
- Do not implement the shell or right panel here (use T-136 and T-137 outputs)
- Do not break the URL ?tab persistence contract from T-136
